scope_lock_basis: sync 400, 10/10/10, no cube, Base5, treasure, partless boss, 180s

fight_window.notes: One continuous fight, monotonic DAMAGE counter 0 -> 62.7M, one AMBUSH splash, one results screen. No aborted attempts.

total_damage.solo_note: Solo recording -> team total == Nayuta total. Only Nayuta on screen; only her popups render.

boss_element.verdict: neutral (no elemental-advantage chevrons on any Wind popup; advantage would mark every number). Boss element not shown on the damage-race HUD.

full_burst.reason: Lone Burst-II unit cannot complete the Burst I->II->III chain. Burst gauge ('BURST' bar) fills but never casts. No weapon transform / no burst nuke observed.
full_burst.counter_evidence: All DAMAGE-counter increments across 3 sampled magazines are smooth small per-shot steps (~100-130k per 0.2s = ~4 normal shots); zero million-scale jumps.

fire_cadence.measured_by: ammo counter decrements exactly -4 per 0.2s frame, steady, no ramp (120 -> 0). Verified in two windows (57-64s, 101-107s).
fire_cadence.reload_gap_measured_s: 1.8-1.9 (DAMAGE counter frozen ~9-10 frames at 0.2s sampling); matches datamined 111 frames = 1.85s

counter_reconciliation.method: DAMAGE counter delta between consecutive reload-freezes (one full magazine), divided by rounds fired.

magazines.label: window1_near
magazines.range_band: near (boss center, full firing to empty)

magazines.label: window2_far
magazines.rounds_note: Ammo went 120->10 then HELD at 10 (boss went untargetable/repositioned; she stopped firing). Only 110 rounds landed, so divided by 110 not 120.

magazines.label: window3_near
magazines.range_band: near (boss center, full firing to empty)

counter_reconciliation.summary: Avg per-shot varies ~18.5k (far) to ~28-31k (near). Driven by SMG range falloff (non-core base 19,944 near vs 15,342 far) plus higher core fraction at near range. NOT a burst/buff artifact.

non_core_white.note: Base non-core non-crit normal shot. Purely range-dependent: ~14k at fight start (boss far), 19,944 when boss near, 15,342 when boss far mid-fight. Falloff ratio 15342/19944 = 0.77 (~23%).

crit_orange.note: Orange = crit. Multiplier 1.5x confirmed clean in far window. Near crit popups (~27-30k) noisier due to overlapping stacks.

core_red_CORE_HIT.ratio_to_non_core: core non-crit ~2.0x normal (39,145 ~= 2 x 19,944); best clean CORE HIT read 46,815 (~2.35x, likely core+crit or core-bonus)
core_red_CORE_HIT.note: Red 'CORE HIT' label. Core hit ~= 2x a normal shot as expected; some higher (core+crit) reads present.

small_red_ticks.note: A small recurring secondary damage instance (~45-455) overlaps the main popups. Unidentified (possible element residual / chip). Minor magnitude. Flagged, not resolved.

core_fraction.method: Reconciliation: near avg 28,071 vs non-core 19,944 with core ~2x -> ~30% core (less crits ~25-28%); far avg 18,491 vs non-core 15,342 -> ~15%.
core_fraction.visual: Red core weakpoints on boss; 'CORE HIT' appears in ~40%+ of burst frames near range (persisting popups inflate frame count). Cores are a common minority of shots, fewer at range.
core_fraction.early_vs_late: Core fraction and per-shot are range-driven, not time-driven: near windows (early 58s and late 155s) both ~19,944 base / ~28-31k avg; far mid window (100s) lower.

unreadable_or_flagged: Exact crit value at near range (~27-30k) noisy from overlapping popup stacks.
Core-hit value has two clusters (~39k core, ~47k core+crit) hard to separate cleanly.
Small red ~45-455 secondary tick instance unidentified.
Boss element not labeled on HUD; neutrality inferred from absence of advantage chevrons.
